---
title: "`r params$team_name` <br> Batting <br> `r params$year_start` - `r params$year_end`"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    incremental: false
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
params:
  teamID: "MIL"
  team_name: "Milwaukee Brewers:"
  year_start: 2000
  year_end: 2025
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Lahman)
library(knitr)

player_stats <- Batting %>% 
  filter(teamID == params$teamID,
         yearID >= params$year_start,
         yearID <= params$year_end) %>% 
  group_by(playerID) %>% 
  summarize(
    H = sum(H),
    AB = sum(AB),
    HR = sum(HR),
    BA = round(sum(H) / sum(AB), 3),
    OPS = round((sum(H) / sum(AB)) + (sum(HR) / sum(AB)), 3)
  ) %>%
  filter(AB >= 500) %>%
  left_join(People, by = "playerID") %>%
  mutate(Name = paste(nameFirst, nameLast))

team_stats <- Batting %>% 
  filter(teamID == params$teamID,
         yearID >= params$year_start,
         yearID <= params$year_end) %>% 
  summarize(
    HR = sum(HR),
    BA = round(sum(H) / sum(AB), 3),
    .by = yearID
  )

league_stats <- Batting %>% 
  filter(yearID >= params$year_start,
         yearID <= params$year_end) %>% 
  summarize(
    HR = sum(HR),
    BA = round(sum(H) / sum(AB), 3),
    .by = c('yearID','teamID')
  ) |> 
  summarize(
    HR = mean(HR),
    BA = mean(BA),
    .by = c('yearID')
  )
```

# Why Quarto + RevealJS?

## Cool Interactive Features {.smaller}

::: {.incremental}
- Incremental bullet builds
- Fragments that appear on click
- Code highlighting line-by-line
- Auto-animate transitions
- Speaker notes / chalkboard
- Embedded HTML widgets
:::

# Batting Leaders

## Home Run Leaders

```{r}
player_stats %>%
  select(Name, HR) %>%
  arrange(-HR) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  kable()
```

## OPS Leaders

```{r}
player_stats %>%
  select(Name, OPS) %>%
  arrange(-OPS) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  kable()
```

::: {.fragment}
OPS combines ability to get on base **and** hit for power.
:::

::: {.fragment}
Great single-number summary for offensive value.
:::

# Batting Trends

## Batting Average Trend

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: true
#| code-line-numbers: "2|3|4"
team_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(yearID, BA)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Batting Average")
```

## `r params$team_name` Home Runs vs League Average {auto-animate=true}

```{r}
peakHR <- team_stats |> slice_max(HR,n=1)
team_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(yearID, HR)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Home Runs")#+
  # geom_line(data=league_stats, color = "red",linewidth=1.2, class = "fragment")
```

::: {.fragment}
Peak power occurs in `r peakHR$yearID` with `r peakHR$HR` homeruns
:::

::: {.fragment}
Shortened 2020 season.
:::

## `r params$team_name` Home Runs {auto-animate=true}

```{r}
peakHR <- team_stats |> slice_max(HR,n=1)
team_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(yearID, HR)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Home Runs")+
  geom_line(data=league_stats, color = "red",linewidth=1.2, class = "fragment")
```
